# washly-ts

TypeScript SDK for the [Washly](https://github.com/hcevn/washly) API, auto-generated from the OpenAPI spec using [Fern](https://buildwithfern.com).

## Installation

```bash
npm install @hcevn/washly-ts
```

## Usage

```typescript
import { WashlySDKClient } from "@hcevn/washly-ts";

const client = new WashlySDKClient({ baseUrl: "https://api.washly.app" });
```

## Auto-generated

This package is automatically regenerated on every API change. Do not edit files directly — open a PR against [hcevn/washly](https://github.com/hcevn/washly) instead.
